name: The Tips Golf
about: The Tips Golf is an indoor golf venue located in Miami's Brickell neighborhood, featuring Trackman iO simulators. The venue operates on a per-bay-hour pricing model with options for peak and off-peak rates. It caters to a mix of casual and serious golfers, offering food and drinks, private events, and golf instruction. The space is designed as a luxury indoor golf lounge, blending high-end technology with an upscale social atmosphere. The venue features a full bar, kitchen, and is available for individual and group bookings, corporate events, and memberships.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman iO technology providing accurate data and hyper-realistic simulation
Upscale atmosphere with full bar and kitchen for a complete social experience
Flexible booking system for both individual practice and group events
Professional coaching options available for skill improvement
Convenient location in Brickell with various membership tiers

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-curated small plates and shared bites designed for golfers, available via PDF menu
Full bar with craft cocktails, premium spirits, wine, and local brews

simulator_hardware.notes: Gold standard in golf technology providing precise data and hyper-realistic experience

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, high-quality TaylorMade sets are available for all guests and included with every booking.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has its own full bar and kitchen with a curated menu of food and drinks available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue promotes skipping traditional 5-hour rounds, allowing players to play world-class courses in a fraction of the time, with options for half-hour sessions or full-day play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information regarding kid-friendliness in the provided content.
